definition_notes: All patients with at least one path_synoptics row (primary surgical spine)

sql_object_name: COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM patient_analysis_resolved_v1 WHERE analysis_eligible_flag IS TRUE
definition_notes: Patients with cancer histology + complete staging data sufficient for analysis. Excludes benign-only, missing histology, and non-thyroid malignancy.
manuscript_safe_label: 4,136 patients met analysis eligibility criteria (confirmed thyroid malignancy with complete staging)

sql_object_name: COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM extracted_recurrence_refined_v1 WHERE recurrence_any IS TRUE
definition_notes: All recurrence events (structural confirmed=54, structural date unknown=1764, biochemical only=168). Includes patients identified via Tg trajectory (rising Tg >1.0 and >2x nadir).
manuscript_safe_label: 1,986 patients (18.3%) experienced recurrence (structural or biochemical) among 10,871 surgical patients
alternate_definition_notes: recurrence_risk_features_mv.recurrence_flag reports 1,818 recurrences (excludes 168 biochemical-only events not in risk_mv). Use recurrence_risk_features_mv for structural recurrence; use extracted_recurrence_refined_v1 for all-type recurrence.

definition_notes: Structural recurrence only. confirmed=54, date_unknown=1764. Matches recurrence_risk_features_mv.recurrence_flag count (1818).

sql_object_name: COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM extracted_braf_recovery_v1 WHERE braf_status = 'positive'
definition_notes: BRAF positive after FP correction (structured + NLP-confirmed). Structured-only count: 266. NLP-recovered: 110. All NLP positives require explicit positive qualifier in note text.
manuscript_safe_label: BRAF mutations were identified in 376 of 10,025 molecularly tested patients (3.8%)
alternate_definition_notes: Structured-only (mol_ep.braf_flag): 266. Full cohort denominator: 376/10871 = 3.5%. Use molecular_tested denominator for prevalence.

sql_object_name: COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM extracted_ras_patient_summary_v1 WHERE ras_positive IS TRUE
definition_notes: RAS positive (NRAS+HRAS+KRAS) from subtypes extraction + mutation text parsing + NLP-confirmed entities. ras_flag in mol_ep is FALSE for all rows (known bug); use extracted_ras_patient_summary_v1 exclusively.
manuscript_safe_label: RAS mutations were identified in 292 of 10,025 molecularly tested patients (2.9%)
alternate_definition_notes: mol_ep.ras_flag is unreliable (all FALSE). Do not use.

definition_notes: Patients with any molecular panel result in extracted_molecular_panel_v1. Includes ThyroSeq, Afirma, IHC, PCR, FISH.
manuscript_safe_label: Molecular testing was performed in 10,025 patients (92.2% of surgical cohort)
alternate_definition_notes: molecular_test_episode_v2 has 10026 total patients (includes placeholder rows). Use extracted_molecular_panel_v1 for cleaned count.

definition_notes: STRICT definition: confirmed RAI receipt with documented dose. rai_assertion_status='likely_received' AND dose present. NOTE: 0 patients have 'definite_received' in rai_treatment_episode_v2; all 35 confirmed patients are 'likely_received' with dose verification.
alternate_definition_notes: Broad: confirmed+unconfirmed_with_dose = 41. Any RAI signal (incl. ambiguous/negated): 862. Ambiguous-only: 749. CRITICAL: 'definite_received' tier is EMPTY (0 patients). The prior audit label 'definite/likely = 35' was misleading — all 35 are 'likely_received'.

sql_object_name: COUNT(DISTINCT research_id) FROM extracted_rln_injury_refined_v2 WHERE rln_injury_is_confirmed IS TRUE
definition_notes: 3-tier refined RLN injury: Tier 1 (laryngoscopy-confirmed), Tier 2 (chart-documented), Tier 3 (NLP-confirmed with context filtering). Total refined: 92 (confirmed=59, suspected=33).
manuscript_safe_label: Confirmed RLN injury occurred in 59 patients (0.54%)
alternate_definition_notes: Including suspected: 92 (0.85%). Pre-refinement NLP: 654 (vastly inflated by consent boilerplate).

definition_notes: Patients with at least one confirmed complication after NLP refinement. Per-entity: rln_injury=59; hematoma=38; hypoparathyroidism=34; seroma=28; chyle_leak=20; hypocalcemia=18; wound_infection=2. Sum of per-entity exceeds total because patients can have multiple complications.
manuscript_safe_label: Post-operative complications were confirmed in 287 patients (2.6%)
alternate_definition_notes: Pre-refinement NLP was 3.3% precision. Only refined counts are manuscript-safe.

definition_notes: Patients with validated TIRADS score from Phase 12 Excel ingestion + NLP + ACR recalculation. Data ceiling reached — remaining patients either lack pre-op US in system or had US at external facilities.
